title: The Weekly Challenge - 317
task1_desc: You are given an array of words and a word.
task1_body:
You are given an array of words and a word. Write a script to return true if concatenating the first letter of each word in the given array matches the given word, return false otherwise.
#### Example 1 Input: @array = ("Perl", "Weekly", "Challenge") $word = "PWC" Output: true
#### Example 2 Input: @array = ("Bob", "Charlie", "Joe") $word = "BCJ" Output: true
#### Example 3 Input: @array = ("Morning", "Good") $word = "MM" Output: false
task2_body:
You are given two strings. Write a script to return true if swapping any two letters in one string match the other string, return false otherwise.
#### Example 1 Input: $str1 = "desc", $str2 = "dsec" Output: true
#### Example 2 Input: $str1 = "fuck", $str2 = "fcuk" Output: true
#### Example 3 Input: $str1 = "poo", $str2 = "eop" Output: false
#### Example 4 Input: $str1 = "stripe", $str2 = "sprite" Output: true
Last date to submit the solution `23:59 (UK Time) Sunday 20th April 2025`.
